goal: Fix CSV injection vulnerability and PDF page break truncation

tasks.name: Fix CSV injection in escapeCsv() (B7)
tasks.action: Prefix formula trigger characters (=, +, -, @, \t, \r) with single quote before CSV quoting logic.

tasks.name: Fix PDF page break (W17)
tasks.action: Replace break at page boundary with new PDPageContentStream creation and continue rendering on new page.

commitMessage: fix(reporting): prevent CSV injection and fix PDF multi-page rendering
